# Fabric Yardage Calculator — Free Sewing Fabric Estimator

> Free fabric yardage calculator that estimates how much fabric you need for any sewing project: clothing (skirts, pants, blouses, jackets), home decor (curtains, cushions, quilts), and accessories. Supports inches, centimeters, and yards. No signup required.

## Core Tools
- [Fabric Yardage Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/): Estimate fabric needed for any sewing project
- [How to Calculate Fabric Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/how-to-calculate-fabric-yardage): Complete guide with formulas and examples
- [Calculate Fabric Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/calculate-fabric-yardage): Step-by-step yardage calculator
- [How Much Fabric](https://yardage-calc.com/how-much-fabric): Quick fabric estimation reference
- [Fabric Yardage Reference Table](https://yardage-calc.com/fabric-yardage-reference-table): Standard yardage by project type
- [Fabric Cost Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/fabric-cost-calculator): Calculate total fabric cost
- [Fabric Repeating Pattern Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/fabric-repeating-pattern-calculator): Pattern repeat alignment and extra yardage
- [Fabric Converter](https://yardage-calc.com/fabric-converter): Convert between yards, meters, and inches
- [Fabric Width Converter](https://yardage-calc.com/fabric-width-converter): Convert patterns between fabric widths
- [Bias Binding Fabric Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/bias-binding-fabric-calculator): Calculate bias tape from fabric

## Clothing by Category

### Skirts
- [Circle Skirt Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/circle-skirt-yardage): Full, half, and quarter circle skirt fabric needs
- [A-Line Skirt Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/a-line-skirt-yardage): A-line skirt fabric estimator
- [Pleated Skirt Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/pleated-skirt-yardage): Pleated skirt fabric calculator
- [Mini Skirt Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/mini-skirt-yardage): Mini skirt fabric needs
- [Maxi Skirt Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/maxi-skirt-yardage): Maxi/long skirt fabric estimator

### Tops & Dresses
- [Blouse Yardage Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/blouse-yardage-calculator): Blouse fabric requirements
- [Jacket Yardage Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/jacket-yardage-calculator): Jacket and coat fabric estimation

### Pants
- [Pants Yardage Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/pants-yardage-calculator): Pants and trousers fabric needs

### Accessories
- [Bow Tie Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/bow-tie-yardage): Bow tie fabric estimation
- [Scarf Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/scarf-yardage): Scarf fabric requirements
- [Headband Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/headband-yardage): Headband fabric calculator

## Home Decor

### Curtains & Drapes
- [Curtain Fabric Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/curtain-fabric-yardage): Curtain and drapery fabric calculator
- [Curtain Fabric Calculator Inches](https://yardage-calc.com/curtain-fabric-calculator-inches): Curtain yardage in inches
- [Curtain Fabric Calculator Free](https://yardage-calc.com/curtain-fabric-calculator-free): Free curtain fabric estimator
- [Curtain Calculator Meters](https://yardage-calc.com/curtain-calculator-meters): Curtain yardage in meters
- [Curtain Calculation Formula](https://yardage-calc.com/curtain-calculation-formula): Curtain fabric formula and examples
- [Grommet Curtain Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/grommet-curtain-yardage): Grommet top curtain fabric needs
- [Cafe Curtain Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/cafe-curtain-yardage): Cafe curtain fabric calculator
- [Drapery Fabric Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/drapery-fabric-calculator): Full drapery fabric estimation

### Bedding
- [Crib Sheet Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/crib-sheet-yardage): Crib/baby sheet fabric needs
- [Bed Skirt Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/bed-skirt-yardage): Bed skirt fabric estimator
- [Baby Blanket Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/baby-blanket-yardage): Baby blanket fabric requirements
- [Quilt Fabric Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/quilt-fabric-calculator): Quilt backing and binding yardage

### Pillows & Cushions
- [Pillow Fabric Calculator](https://yardage-calc.com/pillow-fabric-calculator): Throw pillow and bed pillow yardage
- [Cushion Fabric Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/cushion-fabric-yardage): Seat cushion and sofa cushion fabric
- [Changing Pad Cover Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/changing-pad-cover-yardage): Diaper changing pad cover

### Table & Kitchen
- [Placemat Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/placemat-yardage): Placemat fabric needs
- [Napkin Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/napkin-yardage): Fabric napkin estimation
- [Apron Yardage](https://yardage-calc.com/apron-yardage): Apron fabric requirements
